# NavigationMenu

Presents site navigation with links and rich dropdown panels.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/navigation-menu
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview
  slug="navigation-menu"
  example={0}
  code={`<NavigationMenu.Root>
  <NavigationMenu.List>
    <NavigationMenu.Item>
      <NavigationMenu.Trigger>Products</NavigationMenu.Trigger>
      <NavigationMenu.Content>
        <ul style={{ minWidth: "14rem" }}>
          <li><NavigationMenu.Link href="#">Analytics</NavigationMenu.Link></li>
          <li><NavigationMenu.Link href="#">Automation</NavigationMenu.Link></li>
          <li><NavigationMenu.Link href="#">Reports</NavigationMenu.Link></li>
        </ul>
      </NavigationMenu.Content>
    </NavigationMenu.Item>
    <NavigationMenu.Item>
      <NavigationMenu.Link href="#">Pricing</NavigationMenu.Link>
    </NavigationMenu.Item>
  </NavigationMenu.List>
</NavigationMenu.Root>`}
/>
